goal: Fine-tune DistilBERT on full SST-2 dataset using LoRA (rank=8) via remote GPU. Compare against baseline (no LoRA, freeze all but classifier head). Use gpu_run to execute training on remote GPU. Hypothesis: LoRA fine-tuning achieves higher accuracy than head-only fine-tuning while using fewer trainable parameters. Use 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 3 epochs, batch_size=32, lr=2e-5. Report test accuracy, training time, and parameter counts. Paired t-test + Cohen's d.
